approaches_tried.name: Dimensional Transmutation
approaches_tried.finding: Standard transmutation doesn't obviously involve 200 or Z

approaches_tried.name: Scale Hierarchies
approaches_tried.finding: v/Λ_QCD ≈ Z × 200, but 200 has no Z origin

approaches_tried.name: QCD String Tension
approaches_tried.finding: No clear Z connection to string tension

approaches_tried.name: Alternative Formulas
approaches_tried.finding: v/(Z×200) fits better than simple Z powers

critical_observation.implication: Any formula for Λ_QCD is inherently approximate
